```{=html}
<head>
<meta name=viewport content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<script src="https://cdn.geogebra.org/apps/deployggb.js"></script>
</head>
```


```{=html}
<!-- 
Alle geogebra filer placeres i mappen _geogebra
Erstat XXX med nr på app og erstat YYY med navn på ggb-fil -->
<script>
var parameters_inddeling_xyplanen = {
"id": "ggbApplet_inddeling_xyplanen",
"scaleContainerClass": "ggbContainer",
"prerelease":false,
"borderColor":null,
"showMenuBar":false,
"showAlgebraInput":false,
"showToolBar":false,
"showToolBarHelp":false,
"showResetIcon":true,
"enableLabelDrags":false,
"enableShiftDragZoom":true,
"enableRightClick":false,
"errorDialogsActive":false,
"useBrowserForJS":false,
"capturingThreshold":null,
"language":"da",
// use this instead of ggbBase64 to load a .ggb file
 "filename":"_geogebra/plot_af_scores_som_planer.ggb",
};
var applet_inddeling_xyplanen = new GGBApplet(parameters_inddeling_xyplanen, true);
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

```{=html}
<!-- 
Alle geogebra filer placeres i mappen _geogebra
Erstat XXX med nr på app og erstat YYY med navn på ggb-fil -->
<script>
var parameters_softmax_plot = {
"id": "ggbApplet_softmax_plot",
"scaleContainerClass": "ggbContainer",
"prerelease":false,
"borderColor":null,
"showMenuBar":false,
"showAlgebraInput":false,
"showToolBar":false,
"showToolBarHelp":false,
"showResetIcon":true,
"enableLabelDrags":false,
"enableShiftDragZoom":true,
"enableRightClick":false,
"errorDialogsActive":false,
"useBrowserForJS":false,
"capturingThreshold":null,
"language":"da",
// use this instead of ggbBase64 to load a .ggb file
 "filename":"_geogebra/plot_af_sandsynligheder.ggb",
};
var applet_softmax_plot = new GGBApplet(parameters_softmax_plot, true);
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

```{=html}

<script>
window.onload = function() {
  applet_inddeling_xyplanen.inject('ggbApplet_inddeling_xyplanen');
  applet_softmax_plot.inject('ggbApplet_softmax_plot');
  }
</script>

```
